weighting.ffmcap: free-float-adjusted market-cap = full mcap × (1 − promoter%), capped, renormalised

freefloat_source: promoter holding % from screener quarterly shareholding (proxy for NSE IWF)
note: Free-float-mcap weight = full mcap (AMFI ) × free-float factor (1 − promoter%, from quarterly shareholding) / Σ, uncapped (broad index). The free-float factor proxies NSE's IWF via the dominant promoter term (minor strategic/lock-in buckets not separated). EW = 1/N. Free-float coverage 95% of mcap-covered names (rest assume full float).
